name: Legal
description: Legal pages including privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie policy with sticky TOC and print-friendly layout.

page_briefs.privacy: Long-form legal prose with sticky table of contents sidebar. Clean typography with numbered sections, generous line height, and comfortable max-width for readability. Print-friendly layout.
page_briefs.terms: Same structure as privacy page. Sticky TOC on the side, numbered sections of terms text in a clean prose layout with last-updated date at the top.
page_briefs.cookies: Compact legal prose page. Sticky TOC, cookie categories table, and consent management section. Same clean typography and layout as other legal pages.

shells.top-nav-footer: Standard page layout with navigation and footer
